title: Obtain a long-term access token
content:
Use one of the two endpoints to generate a long-term access token: `/oauth2/access_token/` and `/oauth/token/`. A long-term access token is a type of token that you can obtain after receiving authorization from an ad account, a Business Center account, or a TikTok One Creator Marketplace account. The token does not expire. If you want to revoke a long-term access token, use [/oauth2/revoke_token/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739965949088770). > **Note**
> `/oauth2/access_token/` only supports `Content-Type` as `application/json`, while `/oauth/token/` supports `Content-Type` as `application/json` or `application/x-www-form-urlencoded`. ## /oauth2/access_token/ Use this endpoint to get a long-term access token that does not expire. The only supported `Content-Type` value is `application/json`. To generate an access token via `Content-Type` as `application/x-www-form-urlencoded`, see the /oauth/token/ section below. ### Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path|/v1.2/oauth2/access_token/|/v1.3/oauth2/access_token/| |Request parameter data type |`app_id `: number|`app_id`: string | |New request parameters|/|`return_advertiser_ids`| |Response parameter date type|`advertiser_ids`: number[]|`advertiser_ids`: string[]| ``` ### Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/oauth2/access_token/ **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type
Accepted format: `"application/json"` | ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |app_id{Required}|string|ID of your developer app.

To find the App ID, navigate to [My Apps](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/apps/) > App Detail > Basic Information.| |secret{Required}|string| Secret of your developer app.

To find the Secret, navigate to [My Apps](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/apps/) > App Detail > Basic Information. | |auth_code {Required}|string|The authorization code (`auth_code`) generated by your Advertiser authorization URL.

The code is valid for one hour and can only be used once.

To find out how to get the authorization code based on the type of API you use, see the "Authorization URL" row in [Comparing authorization for different APIs](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1781891256601602#item-link-Comparing%20authorization%20for%20different%20APIs). | |return_advertiser_ids|boolean|Whether to return the full list of ad accounts that the generated token can access through `advertiser_ids` in the response.

Supported values: `true`, `false`.

Default value: `true`.

Note: If you have access to thousands of ad accounts or more, setting this field to `false` can prevent timeouts when retrieving the full list of all advertiser IDs in the response.

| ``` #### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location -request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/oauth2/access_token/' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data '{ "app_id": "{{app_id}}", "secret": "{{secret}}", "auth_code": "{{auth_code}}" }' (/code) ``` ### Response ```xtable |Field{30%}|Type {15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |code |number|Return code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Return codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Return codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |request_id |string| The unique ID of the request.| |data |object|Return data. | #|access_token |string|The long-term access token for permission verification| #|advertiser_ids |string[]| The list of ad accounts that the token can access.

When `return_advertiser_ids` is set to `false` in the request, this field will be an empty string array (`[]`). | #|scope |number[]| The scope of permissions granted to the access token.
See [Permission scope](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1753986142651394) to learn about the permission that a scope ID (value of `scope`) corresponds to.| ``` #### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "message": "OK", "code": 0, "data": { "access_token": "xxxxxxxxxxxxx", "scope": [ 4 ], "advertiser_ids": [ "123456789", "123456781" ] }, "request_id": "2020042715295501023125104093250" } (/code); ``` ## /oauth/token/ Use this endpoint to get an access token. The supported `Content-Type` values are `application/x-www-form-urlencoded` and `application/json`. This is a new endpoint in TikTok API for Business v1.3. ### Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/oauth/token/ **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type
Accepted format: [`application/x-www-form-urlencoded`, `application/json`] | ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| | client_id {Required} | string | ID of your developer app.

To find the App ID, navigate to [My Apps](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/apps/) > App Detail > Basic Information.| | client_secret {Required} | string | Secret of your developer app.

To find the Secret, navigate to [My Apps](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/apps/) > App Detail > Basic Information. | | code {Required} | string | The authorization code (`auth_code`) generated by your Advertiser authorization URL.

The code is valid for one hour and can only be used once.

To find out how to get the authorization code based on the type of API you use, see the "Authorization URL" row in [Comparing authorization for different APIs](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1781891256601602#item-link-Comparing%20authorization%20for%20different%20APIs). | | grant_type {Required} | string | The way of generating the access token.

The allowed enum value: `authorization_code` (To generate the access token by authorization code). | ``` #### Example ##### `Content-Type` as `application/x-www-form-urlencoded` ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/oauth/token/' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' \ --data-urlencode 'grant_type=authorization_code' \ --data-urlencode 'client_id={{client_id}}' \ --data-urlencode 'client_secret={{client_secret}}' \ --data-urlencode 'code={{code}}' (/code) ``` ##### `Content-Type` as `application/json` ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/oauth/token/' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data-raw '{ "grant_type": "authorization_code", "client_id": "{{client_id}}", "client_secret": "{{client_secret}}", "code": "{{code}}" }' (/code) ``` ### Response ```xtable |Field{30%}|Type{15%} |Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |code |number| Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Return codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |message |string| Response message. For details, see [Return codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | | request_id | string | The log ID of a request, which uniquely identifies the request. | | access_token | string | The long-term access token for permission verification. | | token_type | string | Token type. Enum values: `Bearer` (Bearer token. Anyone in possession of the token can use it to access the associated resources). | | advertiser_ids | string[] | The list of ad accounts that the token can access. | | scope | number[] | The endpoints that the token can access.
See [Permission scope](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1753986142651394) to learn about the permission that a scope ID (value of `scope`) corresponds to. | ``` #### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "scope": [ 16000000, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 7043626160646946818, 7050363942434013185, 7134840184444616705, 11000000, 18000000, 15000000, 10000, 19000000, 12000000, 20000000, 13000000, 17000000, 14000000 ], "access_token": "xxx", "token_type": "Bearer", "advertiser_ids": [ xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx ], "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx" } (/code); ```
